title: Add a pmux-to-shiftx optimisation to proc_mux

features.name: shift_register_via_generate_with_conditional_logic
features.description: Code should include a generate loop creating a shift register chain where each element conditionally receives either sequential data or an input, using if-else logic inside procedural blocks

features.name: memory_array_access_via_selector
features.description: Code should include an output assignment that selects from a memory array using a selector signal, creating a mux-like access pattern

features.name: localparam_with_power_of_two_computation
features.description: Code should include a localparam computed as power-of-two minus one, used to define array depth for incomplete case coverage

features.name: priority_mux_conditional_register_assignment
features.description: Code should include an if-else chain inside a clocked procedural block that implements priority-based selection between input and sequential data
